---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: Kanika
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"))

```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))


not_napl_site <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE != "NAPL")

carp_and_20_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE == "CARP" & TRAPS > 20)

# grouping and summarizing by max
max_lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>%
    summarize(MAX_TRAPS = max(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))
```
